judge_reason: Description A describes a circular FBI stamp, a handwritten note with specific date and text, and a green UNCLASSIFIED stamp, while Description B describes only a typed memorandum with no mention of these visual elements, indicating they are describing different content.
original_image_tags: A faded, partially obscured circular stamp reading "FBI" is visible. A handwritten note, oriented diagonally, reads: "Enc & trans. w/ letter to / [illegible name], 9, / 5-17-50 / EN M/Kel". Below this is a green ink stamp: "UNCLASSIFIED FILE BEHIND FILE".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned FBI office memorandum form dated April 11, 1950, with typed text, handwritten annotations, stamps, and file markings.*
